_comment: Human-readable reference for migration 010_seed_plans.sql. The SQL migration is authoritative; this file is the board's at-a-glance reference and can be used to re-seed or verify. stripe_product_id and stripe_price_id are [PROVISION] items — the board creates them in the Stripe dashboard and sets them during provisioning.
name: Standard Membership
stripe_product_id_note: [PROVISION] Create in Stripe dashboard; set in migration or via Supabase update during provisioning
stripe_price_id_note: [PROVISION] Create recurring price in Stripe dashboard; set in membership_plans row

name: Premium Membership
stripe_product_id_note: [PROVISION] Create in Stripe dashboard; set in migration or via Supabase update during provisioning
stripe_price_id_note: [PROVISION] Create recurring price in Stripe dashboard; set in membership_plans row

name: Comped Membership
stripe_product_id_note: Not applicable — comped members never enter Stripe
stripe_price_id_note: Not applicable — dues invoices are waived for comped/lifetime/manual members
benefits: Applied to comped / lifetime / manual members
Member never enters Stripe; dues invoices are waived
_note: membership_status values that map to this plan: 'comped', 'lifetime', 'manual'. The create-checkout-session Edge Function returns MEMBER_NOT_BILLABLE for these statuses.
